title: Heading to Hawaii, Come Hang Out With Me!
excerpt: Aloha! I'm so excited to be going to Hawaii once again for work. The last time I taught a class there was when Jack was just 12 weeks old! I've been working on the details with my friend, Eri from…
body:
Aloha! I'm so excited to be going to Hawaii once again for work. The last time I taught a class there was when Jack was just 12 weeks old! I've been working on the details with my friend, Eri from Sakuralala for quite some time now. All the info can be found here. If you're considering signing up, please do so soon, as half the spots have already been filled! We'll not only be creating the Good Times mini album that I've taught in several places, we will also be working with my favorite Traveler's Notebook - the turquoise kraft one that Eri is bringing all the way from Japan.

The kit is packed full of goodies, as usual. It's even more than what's pictured here.

We've also got some seriously fun surprises including an exclusive print that will be foiled using the Minc, and a first look at a special Hawaii stamp set we collaborated on. Here's a little sneak peek of just part of it.

Not to worry, for those who can't attend in person, we will be doing a giveaway soon and Sakuralala should have them in stock in August. In the workshop, we will also be playing with the Minc and someone in the class will get to win their very own to take home from the class!

Can't wait to see some of you in the sunshine on August 1st in Oahu!
